prompt: A bold Japanese advertising poster on an off-white textured paper background with a slightly worn print grain. Create a full-body fashion-style photo of a young woman standing slightly right of center in a wide, confident stance, legs apart, arms relaxed at her sides, facing forward. Her face is intentionally blurred for anonymity. She has long straight split-dyed hair, one half pastel pink and the other half pastel blue, falling past her chest. She wears a white oversized T-shirt with the black chest print OKIHIRO AI Creative, a light pink pleated mini skirt, and chunky white sneakers. Use clean studio lighting with soft shadows under her feet. Fill the left half of the poster with huge distressed black Japanese typography in an energetic diagonal layout reading センスない奴は画像とテキストを極めろ, with oversized characters stacked and overlapping for maximum impact. Add 2 broad paint-brush swashes behind the lower headline area: 1 pink brush stroke sweeping from the lower left toward center and 1 blue brush stroke sweeping from center-right toward the far right. In the upper right, place a compact vertical block of small black Japanese copy in 4 lines reading: 「AI動画の自動化に 溺れるな。 静止した一枚と、 研ぎ澄まされた言葉が、 最も強い武器になる。」 arranged like a manifesto note. In the lower right, add a small angled English text block in uppercase reading MASTER TEXT & IMAGE. SHAPE PERCEPTION. CONTROL THE OUTCOME.. In the lower left corner, add a small brand signature reading "OKIHIRO AI CREATIVE MANIFESTO". The overall composition should feel like a modern creative manifesto poster, mixing fashion editorial photography, Japanese street advertising, bold typography, and minimalist graphic design.
